channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 61/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 61/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 15.5%.

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): ‘I’m not walking away,’ says Starmer despite defence secretary’s exit
item.description: ‘I’m not walking away,’ says Starmer despite defence secretary’s exit

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Starmer latest: PM vows to fight Burnham if ‘chaotic’ leadership election is triggered
item.description: Starmer latest: PM vows to fight Burnham if ‘chaotic’ leadership election is triggered

item.title: Bluesky · @georgeeaton.bsky.social: Death by a thousand consultations – @marthadacombe.bsky.social on how procrastination became the defining feature of Starmer’s premiership. www.arguably.uk/p/death-by-a...
item.description: Death by a thousand consultations – @marthadacombe.bsky.social on how procrastination became the defining feature of Starmer’s premiership. www.arguably.uk/p/death-by-a...

item.title: BBC Politics: What we found out in Starmer's BBC interview
item.description: What we found out in Starmer's BBC interview

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Starmer defends investment on defence as he vows to fight any leadership challenge – UK politics live
item.description: Starmer defends investment on defence as he vows to fight any leadership challenge – UK politics live

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Starmer admits he must ‘turn things around’ as defence resignations rock his leadership
item.description: Starmer admits he must ‘turn things around’ as defence resignations rock his leadership

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Healey showdown raises fresh questions over Starmer-Reeves power dynamic
item.description: Healey showdown raises fresh questions over Starmer-Reeves power dynamic

item.title: BBC Politics: I have a duty to stay on, says PM as he justifies defence spending decisions
item.description: I have a duty to stay on, says PM as he justifies defence spending decisions

item.title: LabourList: 'Healey and Carns are gone. Labour must finally get serious about national security'
item.description: 'Healey and Carns are gone. Labour must finally get serious about national security'

item.title: Bloomberg.com: Starmer Vows to Fight On After Defense Chief’s Resignation - Bloomberg.com
item.description: Starmer Vows to Fight On After Defense Chief’s Resignation - Bloomberg.com
